capabilities.name: listPatent
capabilities.description: Preview a browser-simulated seller intake payload for a patent listing.

capabilities.name: previewValuation
capabilities.description: Return a mock AI valuation preview for the staged patent listing.

capabilities.name: discoverListings
capabilities.description: Show how a buyer-facing discovery result would appear in the static marketplace demo.

capabilities.name: openListingFacts
capabilities.description: Reveal structured facts for a featured listing in the platform demo.

capabilities.name: submitMockBid
capabilities.description: Advance the simulated buyer flow with a mock bid request.

capabilities.name: advanceMockTransaction
capabilities.description: Move the demo through mock ACP-style states such as mock-approved and mock-settled.

auth.note: Static GitHub Pages demo. No live token endpoint or delegated payment API is enabled.
